_note: Hermes-style goal definition. Reflection scores recent performance against these thresholds.
_startingEquity_note: Scanner acct 2118552 balance on 2026-07-03 (post demo reset). Used as denominator for return % and drawdown %.
_targetAbsolute_note: Refreshed moonshot (operator, 2026-07-03): $10.7k -> $500k in 90 days (~46.8x, ~4.4%/day compounded). scale_risk_to_goal rails riskPct to its 10/7/5 cap whenever the measured 30d edge is positive; on negative edge it halves current risk instead of scaling up.
_targetReturn30d_note: 260% per 30d derived from the 90-day moonshot (46.8x^(1/3) per 30d). Use 0.05 (5%/30d) for steady-state mode if downscaling the goal.
_maxDrawdown_note: Moonshot setting - accepts deep drawdown. Tighten back to 0.08 if reverting to steady-state.
